name: the review queue routes a high-confidence zero-gap rule to auto-stage
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-clean --tool eslint --prose 'Never use var.' --json > d.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/review-queue.sh" --in d.json 2>e.txt; grep -q 'rule=g-clean confidence=high gaps=0 queue=auto-stage' e.txt && echo auto-staged 1>&2
